Private Practice Simulator

This browser-based replay simulator is a private educational practice tool for chart replay and simulated trade review only.

  • It does not provide financial, investment, tax, legal, trading, brokerage, prop-firm, or other professional advice.
  • It does not recommend when to buy, sell, hold, enter, exit, or risk real money.
  • Simulated and hypothetical results do not represent real trading results and do not guarantee or predict future performance.
  • Trading involves risk. Any real trading decision made outside this simulator is your responsibility.
By entering the access password and using this site, you agree that this is only a private practice website and that you understand the terms listed above.
Incorrect password. Please enter the access password to continue.

Private educational simulator only. Not financial advice. Not affiliated with any broker, charting platform, exchange, index provider, market-data provider, or prop firm.

Replay Trader
Wheel zooms. Drag chart left/right/up/down to pan. Drag right price scale to stretch candles.

Simulator Settings

Configure your replay session.

Performance

Account equity$50,000.00Trail floor$47,500.00Drawdown room$2,500.00Day P/L$0.00Net P/L$0.00Trades0Win rate--Profit factor--

Account / Risk

QQQ/SPY CSV data is fine; the simulator treats price movement using the futures contract selected here.

Session

Scenarios use a fixed 24-hour lookback from continuous NQ1/ES1 futures data. Gaps and time-of-day filters are disabled for the embedded data.

Data embedded market data ready

This build includes embedded continuous NQ1 data for MNQ/NQ and continuous ES1 data for MES/ES. You can still import another CSV if you want.

About

Futures Replay Simulator
Version 5.15
Build: Mobile Polish v1
Created by @_aidan_w

This is a private, browser-based replay simulator built for educational chart practice and simulated trade review. It is not a broker, signal service, trading system, financial adviser, investment adviser, tax adviser, legal adviser, prop-firm service, or professional advice platform.

The simulator may display historical, imported, sample, or market-style data for practice. Data and simulated results are provided only for private educational testing. Do not copy, resell, republish, or redistribute any market data from this site.

Settings, preferences, and practice statistics may be saved locally in your browser storage. The creator does not receive your simulator stats from this static site.

Terms of use / disclaimer

This simulator is provided only for private education, chart replay, journaling, and practice. It is not a brokerage platform, signal service, financial adviser, investment adviser, prop-firm service, or trading recommendation system. Nothing in this simulator should be interpreted as financial, investment, tax, legal, brokerage, prop-firm, or trading advice.

Historical, simulated, and hypothetical results are not real trading results and are not guarantees or predictions of future performance. Simulated trading cannot fully account for slippage, liquidity, commissions, execution delays, emotional pressure, live-market conditions, or real financial risk. Market data may be incomplete, delayed, inaccurate, adjusted, imported from third-party files, or provided only for private educational testing. Do not copy, resell, republish, or redistribute market data from this site. Futures, stocks, options, and other financial instruments involve substantial risk, including the risk of losing more than expected. You are solely responsible for any real trading decisions you make outside this simulator.

This software is provided “as is” and “as available,” without warranties of any kind. Use it at your own risk. The author is not responsible for trading losses, missed trades, data errors, software bugs, browser issues, or decisions made based on simulator output.

Privacy

This browser-based simulator is hosted as a static site. It does not create accounts, collect payments, sell personal information, or intentionally send your trades, settings, or performance stats to the site owner. Settings, simulator preferences, and performance statistics may be saved locally in your browser storage so the simulator can remember them on this computer. Your browser and hosting provider may still process standard technical data needed to load the site.

If you clear browser data, use another browser, or open the simulator on another computer, locally saved settings and stats may not carry over.

Cookies / local storage

This site does not intentionally use advertising cookies, tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or third-party marketing pixels. It may use browser local storage or similar local browser storage only to remember simulator settings and practice statistics. If this site is modified later or connected to third-party services, this notice should be updated to accurately describe those changes.
